whyDuns.title: Why do you need a DUNS number?
whyDuns.subtitle: The D-U-N-S number is your international business passport.

cards.title: Government contracts & tenders
cards.desc: A DUNS number is required for US government contracts via SAM.gov, EU public procurement, and international tenders worldwide.
cards.ariaLabel: Icon for government contracts and international tenders

cards.title: B2B partnerships
cards.desc: Many multinationals require a D-U-N-S number to onboard and verify their international suppliers and partners.
cards.ariaLabel: Icon for B2B partnerships and international suppliers

cards.title: Financial credibility
cards.desc: The DUNS number strengthens your company's financial credibility with partners, banks and investors worldwide.

cards.title: Apple & Google
cards.desc: A D-U-N-S number is required to publish apps on the App Store (Apple Developer Program) and Google Play Store as an organization.
cards.ariaLabel: Icon for Apple Developer Program and Google Play Store

items.a: The D-U-N-S number (Data Universal Numbering System) is a unique 9-digit identifier assigned by Dun & Bradstreet to every business entity worldwide.

items.q: How long does the lookup take?
items.a: The search typically takes between 30 seconds and 2 minutes depending on server load.

items.q: How much does the service cost?
items.a: The D-U-N-S number lookup is available for €4.99. Payment is secured by Stripe and you receive your result instantly after confirmation. You pay for the search service, not for the number itself (assigned free of charge by Dun & Bradstreet at dnb.com).

items.q: What if my company doesn't have a DUNS number?
items.a: If your company is not found, you can request a free DUNS number on the official Dun & Bradstreet website.

items.q: What is the difference between a DUNS number and a tax ID?
items.a: A tax ID (EIN, VAT number, etc.) is a national identifier issued by your government. The D-U-N-S number is an international identifier issued by Dun & Bradstreet and recognized in over 200 countries. Both are complementary.

items.q: Is a DUNS number required for Apple Developer?
items.a: Yes, Apple requires a valid D-U-N-S number to enroll in the Apple Developer Program or Apple Developer Enterprise Program as an organization. Without a DUNS number, you cannot publish apps on the App Store under your company name.

items.q: How do I find my company's DUNS number?
items.a: Most registered businesses already have a D-U-N-S number. Use our service to find it instantly in 2 minutes instead of waiting 30 days through the official process.

seo.title: What is a D-U-N-S number and why do you need one?
paragraphs: The D-U-N-S number (Data Universal Numbering System) is a unique 9-digit business identifier assigned by Dun & Bradstreet to every commercial entity worldwide. Unlike national tax IDs limited to one country, the DUNS number is recognized internationally in over 200 countries.

Whether you want to bid on government contracts via SAM.gov, join the Apple Developer Program, publish on the Google Play Store, or strengthen your company's credibility with B2B partners, the D-U-N-S number is essential.
With DUNS Verify, get your DUNS number in 2 minutes instead of 30 days through the official process. Our service instantly searches the international database and delivers your identifier by email.

cta.title: Ready to find your DUNS number?
cta.subtitle: No more 30-day waits. Find your international business identifier in 2 minutes for only €4.99.

disclaimer: The D-U-N-S® Number is assigned free of charge by Dun & Bradstreet (dnb.com). DUNS Verify is an independent paid search service (€4.99) that helps you find your existing number in 2 minutes. Not affiliated with Dun & Bradstreet.
